problem id: 823be38e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  00100001 -> 00010100
  11000111 -> 01101000
  10001111 -> 11100001
  10011111 -> 11100011
  11100001 -> 00001100
  10110000 -> 00010110
  00101111 -> 11110101
  11111111 -> 11101111
  11010010 -> 00111010
  01101000 -> 10001101

query: 10100110
predicted answer: 01110100
